data.name: BrandHeroSubtitle
data.value: Sign in and keep the prompts worth reusing close at hand.

data.name: BrandPointCapture
data.value: Capture every prompt worth reusing, organised by Project and tag.

data.name: BrandPointCollaborate
data.value: Share with your team or publish a public link in one click.

data.name: BrandPointVersion
data.value: Track versions and roll back when an experiment goes sideways.

data.name: CreateAccountSubtitle
data.value: Choose a provider to create your Workspace. If your account already exists, we will sign you in.

data.name: NoExternalProviderConfigured
data.value: No external sign-in provider is configured.

data.name: SignInError
data.value: We couldn't complete the sign-in. Please try again.

data.name: SignInSubtitle
data.value: Choose a provider to continue to your Workspace.
